productDisplayName: Peter England Men Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and grey check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, pockets on the chest, and a curved hem Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Chuck that boredom out of your life, slip into this check casual shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england and express your ordinary in style. Crafted from pure cotton fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Wear the sleeves down, or roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve flaps, add on denims and boots, fling a biker jacket and conquer the world in style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
